questionText: Which of the following agricultural commodities that your organization produces and/or sources are the most significant to your business by revenue?
questionKo: 다음 중 농산물 원자재 that 귀사 produces 및/또는 sources are the most significant to your business by 매출에
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp:
This question enables data users to understand how reliant your business is on produced or sourced agricultural commodities that: 
are highly dependent on natural capital and its associated ecosystem services that are under risk due to climate change; 
are closely associated with high CO2e emissions, either from their production/exploitation or from processing/manufacturing/distribution activities; and/or 
require relatively large quantities of water. 
This information signals your organization's exposure to risk where these commodities are not produced sustainably or managed carefully.

columns.text: % of revenue dependent on this agricultural commodity
columns.textKo: % of 매출 dependent on this agricultural commodity

columns.text: Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of revenue?
columns.textKo: Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of 매출?

guidance.text: No change; New question for Ocean
guidance.textKo: No change; New 문항 for Ocean

guidance.text: Your response to this question will determine which subsequent questions are presented. If your response to 1.23 is amended, data in those dependent questions may be erased.
guidance.textKo: Your response to this 문항 will determine which subsequent questions are presented. 만약 your response to 1.23 is amended, data in those dependent questions may be erased.

guidance.text:
General  
When answering this question, consider the dependency of your revenue on agricultural commodities that your organization either produces and/or sources. Further questions relating to these commodities will be presented. 
You should indicate if you produce and/or source each commodity, even if you do not consider them to be water intensive, carbon intensive, or highly dependent on natural capital.  
Revenue has been chosen as the unique metric to express business dependency, as it is already calculated by many organizations and provides a clear message to investors about an organization's financial dependency. CDP acknowledges that this metric may have caveats, including the effects of yearly fluctuations in currency, which could represent a challenge to disclosers. However, establishing a standard metric helps data users evaluate and compare various organizations. 
Agricultural commodities (column 0)  
If you produce or source a commodity that isn't listed in column 0, indicate this in the "Other commodity" row and specify the name of the commodity produced or sourced by your organization in the "Please explain" column.  
Note for Forests disclosers: Commodities already disclosed in 1.22 do not need to be disclosed on again in this question. 
% of revenue dependent on this agricultural commodity (column 2)  
This column is only presented if you select "Produced", "Sourced", or "Produced and sourced" in column 1 "Produced and/or sourced" for a specific commodity. 
If your organization does not measure the revenue associated with the produced and/or sourced agricultural commodities reported, you may provide an estimate and explain this in the "Please explain" column. 
Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of revenue? (column 3)  
This column is only presented if you select "Produced", "Sourced", or "Produced and sourced" in column 1 "Produced and/or sourced" for a specific commodity. 
Considering your revenue selection in column 2 "% of revenue dependent on this agricultural commodity" and any other contextual factors, indicate whether this commodity is considered significant to your business in terms of revenue.  
Use the "Please explain" column to describe your approach to determining a commodity's significance to your business. 
Please explain (column 4)  
Provide details on how the "% of revenue dependent on this agricultural commodity" in column 2 was calculated. Specify if there are any exclusions and the rationale for such exclusions. 
Briefly describe how you determine whether an agricultural commodity is significant to your organization in terms of revenue, as reported in column 3 "Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of revenue?". Include any thresholds and additional indicators beyond revenue.  
If disclosing on water, state whether a given crop commodity is rainfed or irrigated, or in what proportion.
If applicable, in row "Other commodity" specify the commodity and explain why it has been included in your response, e.g., because it is significant to your revenue and accounts for a high proportion of your water demand.
guidance.textKo: 일반 경우 answering this 문항, consider the dependency of your 매출 on 농산물 원자재 that 귀사 either produces 및/또는 sources. Further questions relating to these commodities will be presented. You 해야 합니다 indicate 만약 you produce 및/또는 source each commodity, even 만약 you do not consider them to be water intensive, carbon intensive, 또는 highly dependent on natural capital. 매출 has been chosen as the unique metric to express business dependency, as it is already calculated by many organizations 및 provides a clear message to investors about an 조직의 financial dependency. CDP acknowledges that this metric may have caveats, 포함 the effects of yearly fluctuations in currency, which could represent a challenge to disclosers. However, establishing a standard metric helps 데이터 사용자 evaluate 및 compare various organizations. 농산물 원자재 (열 0) 만약 you produce 또는 source a commodity that isn't listed in 열 0, indicate this in the "Other commodity" 행 및 specify the name 의 commodity produced 또는 sourced by 귀사 in the "Please explain" 열. Note for Forests disclosers: Commodities already 공개 in 1.22 do not need to be 공개 on again in this 문항. % of 매출 dependent on this agricultural commodity (열 2) This 열 is only presented 만약 you select "Produced", "Sourced", 또는 "Produced 및 sourced" in 열 1 "Produced 및/또는 sourced" for a specific commodity. 만약 귀사 does not measure the 매출 associated with the produced 및/또는 sourced 농산물 원자재 보고, you may provide an estimate 및 explain this in the "Please explain" 열. Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of 매출? (열 3) This 열 is only presented 만약 you select "Produced", "Sourced", 또는 "Produced 및 sourced" in 열 1 "Produced 및/또는 sourced" for a specific commodity. Considering your 매출 selection in 열 2 "% of 매출 dependent on this agricultural commodity" 및 하나 이상 other contextual factors, indicate whether this commodity is considered significant to your business in terms of 매출. Use the "Please explain" 열 to 설명 your approach to determining a commodity's significance to your business. Please explain (열 4) 세부 정보를 입력 on how the "% of 매출 dependent on this agricultural commodity" in 열 2 was calculated. Specify 만약 there are 제외사항 및 the rationale for such 제외사항. Briefly 설명 how you determine whether an agricultural commodity is significant to 귀사 in terms of 매출, as 보고 in 열 3 "Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of 매출?". Include 하나 이상 thresholds 및 additional indicators beyond 매출. 만약 disclosing on water, state whether a given crop commodity is rainfed 또는 irrigated, 또는 in what proportion. 만약 해당되는 경우, in 행 "Other commodity" specify the commodity 및 그 이유를 설명 it has been included in your response, e.g., because it is significant to your 매출 및 accounts for a high proportion of your water demand.

guidance.text:
Aquaculture: the farming of aquatic organisms, including fish, mollusks, crustaceans and aquatic plants. Farming implies some form of intervention in the rearing process to enhance production, such as regular stocking, feeding, protection from predators, etc. Hatchery systems fall under the definition of aquaculture. Farming also implies individual or corporate ownership of the stock being cultivated (adapted from SBTN, 2025 ).
Revenue: gross income arising from the operations of an organization over a period of time.
Wild-capture seafood: marine or freshwater fish or invertebrates that are harvested from the wild (i.e., not farmed). This includes seafood intended for human food consumption, pet food, as well as other uses such as pharmaceuticals and nutraceuticals (adapted from SBTN, 2025 ).
guidance.textKo: Aquaculture: the farming of aquatic organisms, 포함 fish, mollusks, crustaceans 및 aquatic plants. Farming implies some form of intervention in the rearing 프로세스 to enhance production, such as regular stocking, feeding, protection from predators, etc. Hatchery systems fall under the definition of aquaculture. Farming also implies individual 또는 corporate ownership 의 stock being cultivated (adapted from SBTN, 2025 ). 매출: gross income arising from the operations of an organization over a period of time. Wild-capture seafood: marine 또는 freshwater fish 또는 invertebrates that are harvested from the wild (i.e., not farmed). This includes seafood intended for human food consumption, pet food, as well as other uses such as pharmaceuticals 및 nutraceuticals (adapted from SBTN, 2025 ).

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
If disclosing on Forests, columns 'Produced and/or sourced' AND 'Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of revenue?' NOT completed in all rows in questions 1.22 AND 1.23
OR
If not disclosing on Forests, columns 'Produced and/or sourced' AND 'Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of revenue? NOT completed in all rows in question 1.23 - 0/21 points
A maximum of 0/21 points is available for this route.
(Please note: The relevant columns must be completed in every row for ROUTE A) to apply. Partial disclosure that does not meet ROUTE A) will mean the NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE) will apply.)

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

sectorTagsKo: 농산물 원자재, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업
simpleHelpKo: This 문항 enables 데이터 사용자 to understand how reliant your business is on produced 또는 sourced 농산물 원자재 that: are highly dependent on natural capital 및 its associated ecosystem services that are under risk due to climate change; are closely associated with high CO2e emissions, either from their production/exploitation 또는 from 프로세스ing/manufacturing/distribution activities; 및/또는 require relatively large quantities of water. This information signals 귀사의 exposure to risk 여기서 these commodities are not produced sustainably 또는 managed carefully.
